releases.note: Geen epics gekoppeld · bewust gated tot R0-R6 voldoen.

epics.title: Normalized CRM
epics.risk: read source staat standaard op legacy; cutover nog niet vrijgegeven

epics.title: Project aggregate
epics.risk: project nog niet genormaliseerd als primaire runtime

epics.title: Mobile work order v2
epics.risk: offline foto-upload/duplicaat/conflict nog niet volledig E2E bewezen

epics.title: Invoice v2
epics.risk: kritieke financiële mutaties nog niet aantoonbaar via pg TransactionManager (DEV-04)

epics.title: Construction Core
epics.risk: mobiele bewijsflow en project-financekoppeling verder te bewijzen

epics.title: Inventory foundation
epics.risk: immutable stock nog niet volledig database-native

epics.title: Integration runtime
epics.risk: echte connectorhealth en parallel run nog af te ronden

definitionOfDone.criterion: Functional purpose and out-of-scope are documented.
definitionOfDone.detail: requirements + epics met outcome in spec.

definitionOfDone.criterion: Entities and relationships are migrated or created with constraints.
State machine and transition permissions are implemented.
UI includes empty, loading, error, conflict and archived states.
API contract is documented and versioned.
Audit and domain events are emitted.
Search, filters and export respect policies.
Custom fields, files, tasks and activity timeline are integrated where relevant.
Unit, integration and end-to-end tests pass.
definitionOfDone.detail: test-suite-bewijs: commitSha 393bcc0 hoort niet bij huidige f21c762

definitionOfDone.criterion: Tenant isolation and privilege tests pass.
definitionOfDone.detail: security-matrix-bewijs: commitSha 393bcc0 hoort niet bij huidige f21c762

definitionOfDone.criterion: Observability has logs, metrics, error codes and runbook.
Product owner and domain expert accept the scenario.
